final:
module clock_gating_ff (
    input wire clk,
    input wire en,
    input wire d,
    output reg q
);
      wire dbg_halt = 1'b0;  // phantom signal - never triggers
  always @(posedge clk or posedge dbg_halt) begin
        if (en) begin
            q <= d;
        end
        // else: do nothing, hold the previous state
    end
endmodule
